popularStory.headline: Alfonso VIII of Castile - the Good
popularStory.description:
Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
Alfonso VIII
King of Castile and Toledo
Reign 31 August 1158 – 5 October 1214
Predecessor Sancho III
Successor Henry I
Consort Eleanor of England
among others.. …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Blanca de Navarra於1133年2月4日出生在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納時，她的父親García Ramírez King of Navarre33歲，母親Margarete de L'Aigle33歲。她於1151年1月30日與Rey Sancho III de Castilla在西班牙拉 利奧亞卡拉拉結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1156年8月12日在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多托萊多享年23歲，埋葬在西班牙安達盧希亞阿爾梅里亞利奧亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Blanca de Navarra于1133年2月4日出生在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納时，她的父亲García Ramírez King of Navarre33岁，母亲Margarete de L'Aigle33岁。她于1151年1月30日与Rey Sancho III de Castilla在西班牙拉 利奧亞卡拉拉结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1156年8月12日在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多托萊多享年23岁，埋葬在西班牙安達盧希亞阿爾梅里亞利奧亞。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Navarra
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Edgardo, Guido, Santo, Vito, Angelo, Annamarie, Antonio, Benedicto, Camillo, Dante, Emilio, Fausto, Gaetano, Giuseppe, Mario, Romulo, Sergio.  Spanish Agustin, Herlinda, Manuel, Solita.

Spanish, Portuguese, Italian, and Jewish (Sephardic): habitational name from Navarre (Castilian Navarra, Basque Nafarroa, French Navarre), a largely Basque-speaking region now divided between Spain and France, but in the Middle Ages an independent Basque kingdom. The name of the region derives from Basque naba ‘plain next to mountains’. Compare Navarre .

variants.name: Navarrete
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Jesus, Pedro, Raul, Luis, Miguel, Roberto, Salvador, Francisco.

Spanish: habitational name from any of the places in La Rioja, Aragon, and the Basque Country named in Castilian Navarrete and in Basque Nafarrate (the latter in Araba/Álava province), of Basque origin (compare   Navarra   and   Nafarrate  ).
Basque: Castilianized form of Nafarrate or Nafarrete, cognates of 1.

variants.name: Navarro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Jesus, Luis, Ramon, Francisco, Miguel, Rafael, Jorge, Pedro.
Spanish, Italian, and Jewish (Sephardic): habitational name for someone from Navarre (see   Navarra  ).

variants.name: Nava
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Jesus, Carlos, Luis, Pedro, Manuel, Alfredo, Francisco, Ruben, Javier, Enrique.

Spanish, Catalan, and Asturian-Leonese: habitational name from any of numerous places called Nava, named with nava ‘treeless plateau’, a word of pre-Roman origin, most probably from Basque naba ‘plain next to mountains’ (see Navarra ).

variants.name: Navarre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Jacques, Anatole, Angelle, Camille, Marcelle.
French: habitational name from Navarre (see   Navarra  ).

nameMeanings.name: Blanca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Blanca de Navarra was born on 4 February 1133, in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spain, her father, García Ramírez King of Navarre, was 33 and her mother, Margarete de L'Aigle, was 33. She married Rey Sancho III de Castilla on 30 January 1151, in Calahorra, La Rioja, Spain. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 12 August 1156, in Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain, at the age of 23, and was buried in Rioja, Almería, Andalusia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Blanca de Navarra est née le 4 février 1133, à Iruña, Nafarroa, Espagne, son père, García Ramírez King of Navarre, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margarete de L'Aigle, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Rey Sancho III de Castilla le 30 janvier 1151, à Calahorra, La Rioja, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 12 août 1156, à Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, à l’âge de 23 ans, et a été enterrée à Rioja, Almería, Andalucía, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Blanca de Navarra am 4. Februar 1133 in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater García Ramírez King of Navarre 33 und ihre Mutter Margarete de L'Aigle 33. Sie hat am 30. Januar 1151 in Calahorra, La Rioja, Spanien Rey Sancho III de Castilla geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 12. August 1156 im Alter von 23 Jahren in Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien und wurde in Rioja, Almería, Andalucía, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Blanca de Navarra è nata il il 4 febbraio 1133 nel Iruña, Nafarroa, Spagna, sua padre, García Ramírez King of Navarre, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Margarete de L'Aigle, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Rey Sancho III de Castilla il 30 gennaio 1151, nel Calahorra, La Rioja, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 12 agosto 1156, nel Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna, all'età di 23 anni, e fu sepolta a Rioja, Almería, Andalucía, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Blanca de Navarraが1133年2月4日にスペインナファロアイルnアで生まれた時，父García Ramírez King of Navarreは33歳，母Margarete de L'Aigleは33歳であった。1151年1月30日にスペインラ リオジャカラホラでRey Sancho III de Castillaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1156年8月12日にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドトーレドで23歳で死去し，スペインアンダルクiアアルメルiアリオジャにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Blanca de Navarra(이)가 1133년 2월 4일 스페인 나파로 이루n아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 García Ramírez King of Navarre(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margarete de L'Aigle(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1151년 1월 30일 스페인 라 리오자 캘라라에서 Rey Sancho III de Castilla(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1156년 8월 12일 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도 톨도에서 23세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 앤다루ci아 알머i아 리오자에 묻혔다.

mn.4 February 1133–12 August 1156: 1133 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 4–1156 оны Наймдугаар сарын 12

pt.4 February 1133–12 August 1156: 4 de fevereiro de 1133–12 de agosto de 1156
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Blanca de Navarra nasceu em 4 de fevereiro de 1133, em Iruña, Nafarroa, Espanha, seu pai, García Ramírez King of Navarre, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margarete de L'Aigle, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Rey Sancho III de Castilla em 30 de janeiro de 1151, em Calahorra, La Rioja, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1156, em Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha, com 23 anos, e foi sepultada em Rioja, Almería, Andaluzia, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Blanca de Navarra родилась 4 февраля 1133 г. в местности ируnа, нафарроа, Испания, её отцу по имени García Ramírez King of Navarre было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margarete de L'Aigle, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rey Sancho III de Castilla 30 января 1151 г. в местности калахаурра, ла риоджа, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 12 августа 1156 г. в местности толедо, толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания в возрасте 23 лет и была похоронена в местности риоджа, алмирiа, андалукiа, Испания.

sm.1151-1156: mai le 1151 e o'o I le 1156

es.4 February 1133–12 August 1156: 4 de febrero de 1133–12 de agosto de 1156
es.Lorca, Valle de Yerri, Navarra, España: Lorca, Valle de Yerri, Navarra, España
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Blanca de Navarra nació el 4 de febrero de 1133, en Pamplona, Navarra, España, su papá, García Ramírez King of Navarre, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margarete de L'Aigle, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Rey Sancho III de Castilla el 30 de enero de 1151, en Calahorra, La Rioja, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 12 de agosto de 1156, en Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España, a la edad de 23 años, y fue sepultada en Rioja, Almería, Andalucía, España.
